description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply angled nose, designed for high-speed flight. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, giving it an agile, aerodynamic profile, and they feature subtle dihedral angles for stability. The cockpit is forward-mounted with a tinted, enclosed canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. The rear of the airplane houses a single, prominent jet engine with a circular exhaust and yellow hazard markings. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all of which appear to be fixed.
description: A streamlined, modern airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, a single rear jet engine, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Features a conventional tail and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the main landing gear under the wings.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the circular jet engine exhaust and swept-back wings with visible dihedral.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the engine, tail assembly, and the right main landing gear.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the cockpit canopy, nose, and the left main landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with circular exhaust.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy.
